hypothesis: Systems-optimizer replayable proofs become safer if every command list also rejects lone `&` shell control operators, so bounded runner or promotion commands cannot background themselves or append leaked shell work behind an otherwise valid CLAW prefix.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `findShellControlOperator` rejected `&&` and `||` but not a lone `&`, so a synchronized falsification that changed `sysopt.runner-stability-evidence-boundary-lock.evidence_commands[0]` to `node CLAW/scripts/recover-cycle.mjs --max-age-minutes=0 & echo leaked-proof` in both backlog and hypothesis-card surfaces could still verify clean. After the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` rejects lone `&` shell control operators across systems-optimizer command lists while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if lone-ampersand systems-optimizer command strings fail verification and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Systems-optimizer command lists must reject lone `&` shell operators; blocking `&&` and `||` alone still leaves backgrounded or chained shell work inside replayable proof.
